    Race Day

    A Smooth Start
    A Strong Finish

    Everything you need to know for a confident, calm race morning—from parking to packet pickup.

    Quick Checklist

    • Packet pickup: Advance pickup recommended (friends/family can pick up for you).
    • Start times: Tot Trot at 8:30 am and main event at 9:00 am on Thanksgiving Day.
    • Location: Shops on Lane Avenue, Columbus.
    • Parking: Use marked public parking in nearby areas.
    Ask A QuestionView Distances

    Need Directions?

    Shops on Lane Avenue,

    1675 W Lane Ave,
    Columbus, OH 43221

    Open Maps
    Questions about volunteering, sponsors, or accessibility? Email us at info@columbusturkeytrot.com.

    Frequently Asked

    When should I arrive?

    Plan to arrive early to park, warm up, and find your start corral. If you’re new to racing, give yourself extra time to get settled.

    Where do I park?

    Use available public parking around Shops on Lane Avenue and nearby areas as directed on race morning.

    What should I bring?

    Bring your bib, safety pins, comfortable layers for the weather, and hydration if you prefer your own. Most importantly—bring your energy and your friends.

    Is there support on course?

    Yes—expect volunteers, signage, and a supportive community vibe. If you have specific accessibility questions, email us and we’ll help.

    Address

    Shops on Lane Avenue,
    1675 W Lane Ave,
    Columbus, OH 43221
